mapper.select: SELECT h.eml_sndng_hist_sn AS seqNo , h.sndng_rslt_cd AS status , h.rcvr_eml_addr AS receiver , m.eml_ttl AS subject , h.sndng_dttm AS sendDateTime , h.fail_rsn_cn AS reason FROM public.tb_ca_l_eml_sndng_hist h INNER JOIN public.tb_ca_m_eml_sndng m ON h.eml_sndng_sn = m.eml_sndng_sn ORDER BY h.sndng_dttm DESC
